```{r}
combined_dataset_diag_diagnose_H_CMPF1_w1_low <- combined_dataset_diag_diagnose_H_CMPF_w1_low %>%
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = name_order),
         Adjustment = factor(Adjustment, levels = method_order))
# Your existing ggplot code with the addition of reversing the legend order
hcmpf_psy_w1_low <- ggplot(combined_dataset_diag_diagnose_H_CMPF1_w1_low, aes(x = OR, y = name, color = Adjustment)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = CIL, xmax = CIH), width = 0.2, size = 1.2, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width), size = 4) +
  geom_text(aes(x = CIH + text_offset, 
                label = if_else(p.value < 0.001, 
                                paste("** (", formatC(p.value, format = "e", digits = 1), ")", sep = ""),  # Scientific notation for p < 0.001
                                if_else(p.value < 0.01, 
                                        paste("** (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 3), nsmall = 3)), ")", sep = ""),  # Three digits if p < 0.01
                                        if_else(p.value < 0.05, 
                                                paste("* (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 2), nsmall = 2)), ")", sep = ""),  # Two digits for 0.01 ≤ p < 0.05
                                                if_else(p.value < 0.1,
                                                        paste(". (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 2), nsmall = 2)), ")", sep = ""),  # Two digits for 0.05 ≤ p < 0.1 with "."
                                                        "")))),  # Hide p-values for p >= 0.1
                hjust = -0.1), size = 4.5, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "longdash") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#345d67", "#f09308")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "right") +
  ylab("") +
  xlab("OR") +
  ggtitle("Hydroxy-CMPF and NDD week 1-low") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE))

hcmpf_psy_w1_low
#RCT
#Hydroxy-CMPF diagnose
combined_dataset_diag_diagnose_H_CMPF_w1_high<-bind_rows(
  mutate(Result_table_fdr_diagnose_H_CMPF_unadj_w1_high, Adjustment = "Unadjusted"),
  mutate(Result_table_fdr_diagnose_H_CMPF_adj_w1_high, Adjustment = "Adjusted"),
)


replacements <- setNames(c("Autism","ADHD Inattentive","ADHD Combined","ADHD","Any NDDs"), c("asd", "adhd_inattention","adhd_ih","adhd","Any_NDD"))
combined_dataset_diag_diagnose_H_CMPF_w1_high$name <- with(combined_dataset_diag_diagnose_H_CMPF_w1_high, ifelse(name %in% names(replacements), replacements[name], name))

name_order <- c("ADHD Combined","ADHD Inattentive", "ADHD", "Autism","Any NDDs")
combined_dataset_diag_diagnose_H_CMPF1_w1_high <- combined_dataset_diag_diagnose_H_CMPF_w1_high %>%
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = name_order),
         Adjustment = factor(Adjustment, levels = method_order))
# Your existing ggplot code with the addition of reversing the legend order
#save(combined_dataset_diag_diagnose_H_CMPF1_w1_high,file ="~/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-ting.wang@dbac.dk/My Drive/CMPF/CMPF and NDD/manuscript/figures/20250705/combined_dataset_diag_diagnose_H_CMPF_w1_high.Rdata" )

hcmpf_psy_w1_high <- ggplot(combined_dataset_diag_diagnose_H_CMPF1_w1_high, aes(x = OR, y = name, color = Adjustment)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = CIL, xmax = CIH), width = 0.2, size = 1.2, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width), size = 4) +
  geom_text(aes(x = CIH + text_offset, 
                label = if_else(p.value < 0.001, 
                                paste("** (", formatC(p.value, format = "e", digits = 1), ")", sep = ""),  # Scientific notation for p < 0.001
                                if_else(p.value < 0.01, 
                                        paste("** (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 3), nsmall = 3)), ")", sep = ""),  # Three digits if p < 0.01
                                        if_else(p.value < 0.05, 
                                                paste("* (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 2), nsmall = 2)), ")", sep = ""),  # Two digits for 0.01 ≤ p < 0.05
                                                if_else(p.value < 0.1,
                                                        paste(". (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 2), nsmall = 2)), ")", sep = ""),  # Two digits for 0.05 ≤ p < 0.1 with "."
                                                        "")))),  # Hide p-values for p >= 0.1
                hjust = -0.1), size = 4.5, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "longdash") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#345d67", "#f09308")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "right") +
  ylab("") +
  xlab("OR") +
  ggtitle("Hydroxy-CMPF and NDD week 1-high") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE))

hcmpf_psy_w1_high
```
CMPF
```{r}
#low
combined_dataset_diag2_CMPF_w1_low<-bind_rows(
  mutate(Result_table_fdr_diagnose_CMPF_unadj_w1_low, Adjustment = "Unadjusted"),
  mutate(Result_table_fdr_diagnose_CMPF_adj_w1_low, Adjustment = "Adjusted"),
)

replacements <- setNames(c("Autism","ADHD Inattentive","ADHD Combined","ADHD","Any NDDs"), c("asd", "adhd_inattention","adhd_ih","adhd","Any_NDD"))
combined_dataset_diag2_CMPF_w1_low$name <- with(combined_dataset_diag2_CMPF_w1_low, ifelse(name %in% names(replacements), replacements[name], name))


name_order <- c("ADHD Combined","ADHD Inattentive", "ADHD", "Autism","Any NDDs")
combined_dataset_diag2_CMPF_w1_2_low<- combined_dataset_diag2_CMPF_w1_low %>%
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = name_order),
         Adjustment = factor(Adjustment, levels = method_order))

cmpf_psy_w1_low<-ggplot(combined_dataset_diag2_CMPF_w1_2_low, aes(x = OR, y = name, color = Adjustment)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = CIL, xmax = CIH), width = 0.2, size = 1.2, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width), size = 4) +
  geom_text(aes(x = CIH + text_offset, 
                label = if_else(p.value < 0.001, 
                                paste("** (", formatC(p.value, format = "e", digits = 1), ")", sep = ""),  # Scientific notation for p < 0.001
                                if_else(p.value < 0.01, 
                                        paste("** (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 3), nsmall = 3)), ")", sep = ""),  # Three digits if p < 0.01
                                        if_else(p.value < 0.05, 
                                                paste("* (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 2), nsmall = 2)), ")", sep = ""),  # Two digits for 0.01 ≤ p < 0.05
                                                if_else(p.value < 0.1,
                                                        paste(". (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 2), nsmall = 2)), ")", sep = ""),  # Two digits for 0.05 ≤ p < 0.1 with "."
                                                        "")))),  # Hide p-values for p >= 0.1
                hjust = -0.1), size = 4.5, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "longdash") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#345d67", "#f09308")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "right") +
  ylab("") +
  xlab("OR") +
  ggtitle("CMPF and NDD week 1 low") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE))

cmpf_psy_w1_low
#high
combined_dataset_diag2_CMPF_w1_high<-bind_rows(
  mutate(Result_table_fdr_diagnose_CMPF_unadj_w1_high, Adjustment = "Unadjusted"),
  mutate(Result_table_fdr_diagnose_CMPF_adj_w1_high, Adjustment = "Adjusted"),
)

replacements <- setNames(c("Autism","ADHD Inattentive","ADHD Combined","ADHD","Any NDDs"), c("asd", "adhd_inattention","adhd_ih","adhd","Any_NDD"))
combined_dataset_diag2_CMPF_w1_high$name <- with(combined_dataset_diag2_CMPF_w1_high, ifelse(name %in% names(replacements), replacements[name], name))


name_order <- c("ADHD Combined","ADHD Inattentive", "ADHD", "Autism","Any NDDs")
combined_dataset_diag2_CMPF_w1_2_high<- combined_dataset_diag2_CMPF_w1_high %>%
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = name_order),
         Adjustment = factor(Adjustment, levels = method_order))
logtransform <- function(x, na.rm = FALSE) (x %>% log())
combined_dataset_diag2_CMPF_w1_2_high_log <- combined_dataset_diag2_CMPF_w1_2_high%>% mutate(across(c("OR":"CIH"), logtransform))

cmpf_psy_w1_high<-ggplot(combined_dataset_diag2_CMPF_w1_2_high_log, aes(x = OR, y = name, color = Adjustment)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = CIL, xmax = CIH), width = 0.2, size = 1.2, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width), size = 4) +
  geom_text(aes(x = CIH + text_offset, 
                label = if_else(p.value < 0.001, 
                                paste("** (", formatC(p.value, format = "e", digits = 1), ")", sep = ""),  # Scientific notation for p < 0.001
                                if_else(p.value < 0.01, 
                                        paste("** (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 3), nsmall = 3)), ")", sep = ""),  # Three digits if p < 0.01
                                        if_else(p.value < 0.05, 
                                                paste("* (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 2), nsmall = 2)), ")", sep = ""),  # Two digits for 0.01 ≤ p < 0.05
                                                if_else(p.value < 0.1,
                                                        paste(". (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 2), nsmall = 2)), ")", sep = ""),  # Two digits for 0.05 ≤ p < 0.1 with "."
                                                        "")))),  # Hide p-values for p >= 0.1
                hjust = -0.1), size = 4.5, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "longdash") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#345d67", "#f09308")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "right") +
  ylab("") +
  xlab("log(OR)") +
  ggtitle("CMPF and NDD week 1 high") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE))

cmpf_psy_w1_high
```

3-CMPFP
```{r}
#RCT
combined_dataset_diag_3CMPFP_w1_RCT<-bind_rows(
  mutate(Result_table_fdr_diagnose_3_CMPFP_unadj_w1_RCT, Adjustment = "Unadjusted"),
  mutate(Result_table_fdr_diagnose_3_CMPFP_adj_w1_RCT, Adjustment = "Adjusted"),
)

replacements <- setNames(c("Autism","ADHD Inattentive","ADHD Combined","ADHD","Any NDDs"), c("asd", "adhd_inattention","adhd_ih","adhd","neu_dev"))
combined_dataset_diag_3CMPFP_w1_RCT$name <- with(combined_dataset_diag_3CMPFP_w1_RCT, ifelse(name %in% names(replacements), replacements[name], name))


name_order <- c("ADHD Combined","ADHD Inattentive", "ADHD", "Autism","Any NDDs")
combined_dataset_diag_3CMPFP_w1_2_RCT <- combined_dataset_diag_3CMPFP_w1_RCT %>%
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = name_order),
         Adjustment = factor(Adjustment, levels = method_order))

# Your existing ggplot code with the addition of reversing the legend order
cmpfp3_psy_w1_RCT<-ggplot(combined_dataset_diag_3CMPFP_w1_2_RCT, aes(x = OR, y = name, color = Adjustment)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = CIL, xmax = CIH), width = 0.2, size = 1.2, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width), size = 4) +
  geom_text(aes(x = CIH + text_offset, 
                label = if_else(p.value < 0.001, 
                                paste("** (", formatC(p.value, format = "e", digits = 1), ")", sep = ""),  # Scientific notation for p < 0.001
                                if_else(p.value < 0.01, 
                                        paste("** (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 3), nsmall = 3)), ")", sep = ""),  # Three digits if p < 0.01
                                        if_else(p.value < 0.05, 
                                                paste("* (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 2), nsmall = 2)), ")", sep = ""),  # Two digits for 0.01 ≤ p < 0.05
                                                if_else(p.value < 0.1,
                                                        paste(". (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 2), nsmall = 2)), ")", sep = ""),  # Two digits for 0.05 ≤ p < 0.1 with "."
                                                        "")))),  # Hide p-values for p >= 0.1
                hjust = -0.1), size = 4.5, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "longdash") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#345d67", "#f09308")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "right") +
  ylab("") +
  xlab("OR") +
  ggtitle("3-CMPFP and NDD week 1 RCT") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE))
cmpfp3_psy_w1_RCT

combined_dataset_diag_3CMPFP_w1_placebo<-bind_rows(
  mutate(Result_table_fdr_diagnose_3_CMPFP_unadj_w1_placebo, Adjustment = "Unadjusted"),
  mutate(Result_table_fdr_diagnose_3_CMPFP_adj_w1_placebo, Adjustment = "Adjusted"),
)

replacements <- setNames(c("Autism","ADHD Inattentive","ADHD Combined","ADHD","Any NDDs"), c("asd", "adhd_inattention","adhd_ih","adhd","neu_dev"))
combined_dataset_diag_3CMPFP_w1_placebo$name <- with(combined_dataset_diag_3CMPFP_w1_placebo, ifelse(name %in% names(replacements), replacements[name], name))


name_order <- c("ADHD Combined","ADHD Inattentive", "ADHD", "Autism","Any NDDs")
combined_dataset_diag_3CMPFP_w1_2_placebo <- combined_dataset_diag_3CMPFP_w1_placebo %>%
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = name_order),
         Adjustment = factor(Adjustment, levels = method_order))

# Your existing ggplot code with the addition of reversing the legend order
cmpfp3_psy_w1_placebo<-ggplot(combined_dataset_diag_3CMPFP_w1_2_placebo, aes(x = OR, y = name, color = Adjustment)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = CIL, xmax = CIH), width = 0.2, size = 1.2, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width), size = 4) +
  geom_text(aes(x = CIH + text_offset, 
                label = if_else(p.value < 0.001, 
                                paste("** (", formatC(p.value, format = "e", digits = 1), ")", sep = ""),  # Scientific notation for p < 0.001
                                if_else(p.value < 0.01, 
                                        paste("** (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 3), nsmall = 3)), ")", sep = ""),  # Three digits if p < 0.01
                                        if_else(p.value < 0.05, 
                                                paste("* (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 2), nsmall = 2)), ")", sep = ""),  # Two digits for 0.01 ≤ p < 0.05
                                                if_else(p.value < 0.1,
                                                        paste(". (", sub("^0\\.", ".", format(round(p.value, 2), nsmall = 2)), ")", sep = ""),  # Two digits for 0.05 ≤ p < 0.1 with "."
                                                        "")))),  # Hide p-values for p >= 0.1
                hjust = -0.1), size = 4.5, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "longdash") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#345d67", "#f09308")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "right") +
  ylab("") +
  xlab("OR") +
  ggtitle("3-CMPFP and NDD week 1 placebo") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE))
cmpfp3_psy_w1_placebo
```

```{r}
combined_plot_w1_strata <- ggarrange(
cmpf_psy_w1_RCT,
  hcmpf_psy_w1_RCT,
 cmpfp3_psy_w1_RCT,
  cmpf_psy_w1_placebo,
  hcmpf_psy_w1_placebo,
cmpfp3_psy_w1_placebo,
  ncol = 3, nrow = 2,
  align = "hv",             # Align both horizontal and vertical axes
  common.legend = TRUE,     # Share the legend among plots
  legend = "right",         # Position the legend on the right side
  labels = c("a", "b", "c","d", "e", "f"), # Labels for subplots
  label.x = 0.1,            # Adjust horizontal position of labels
  label.y = 1.0,            # Adjust vertical position of labels
  font.label = list(size = 14, face = "bold") # Font size and style for labels
)
# Print the combined plot
print(combined_plot_w1_strata)
```
